text: Abstract: Today, the landscape of the field of Artificial Intelligence has changed significantly in the recent years. The advancements and achievements in generative models in both supervised and unsupervised learning have set a new benchmark in achieving solutions to several complex problems in the real life, starting from image translation, to medical diagnosis, image to text generation, and even natural language processing and so many other applications. In this paper, a systematic review will be presented, with a deep dive into the state of the art of the Generative AI, the recent developments and applications including the models specifically designed for each application. Generative AI, so far, has impacted the world of language generation, by the development of large language models, as well as the image translation and the numerous interdisciplinary applications of generative AI. Also, this paper bridges the recent discoveries in the mentioned fields, connecting the current research in generative AI, with an investigation of the potential future developments in the field of Generative AI. Finally, it concludes with a brief discussion on the Responsible AI principles and the ethics needed for the sustainable development of generative AI.
